title: "Teacher pack" bundle export (multi-guide printable + materials list)
context: Teachers planning a unit or a term often want to print or download a bundle of guides rather than printing each one individually. A client-side "teacher pack" feature lets an educator select multiple guides and generate a single printable document that includes all selected guides plus a consolidated materials list (quantities summed across experiments, deduplicating shared items). This feature is purely client-side and generates no server requests; no user data is collected.
objective: Implement a client-side "teacher pack" bundle export feature that allows educators to select multiple guides from the browse view and generate a single printable/PDF-ready document. The bundle includes each selected guide in full (with its complete safety block) and a consolidated materials list summarizing all required items and quantities across the selected guides. Generation is client-side only (no server round-trip); the result is printed or saved via the browser's native print/save-as-PDF.
acceptanceCriteria: The feature allows an educator to select multiple guides from the browse/filter view and trigger a bundle export

The exported bundle includes each selected guide in full, including its complete safety block (hazards, PPE, minAge, supervision, allergens/ingestion, disposal, prohibited substitutions, firstAidRef), without any safety-related omissions
The bundle includes a consolidated materials list that aggregates and deduplicates materials across all selected guides, with total quantities and per-guide provenance
Bundle generation is implemented entirely client-side; no network request is made during or after guide selection or bundle generation
No user data (selected guides, preferences, identity) is transmitted to any server, analytics endpoint, or third party; no localStorage or cookie is required beyond what the site already uses
The printed/PDF output is readable, accessible, and passes the same print-output quality bar as individual guide printouts (clean layout, no clipped content, readable fonts)
The feature is fully accessible: guide selection is keyboard and screen-reader operable; the bundle trigger is WCAG 2.2 AA compliant
The CI no-telemetry E2E test still passes; the offline E2E test confirms the feature works after first load with no connectivity
output: A pull request adding the client-side teacher pack bundle export (multi-guide printable output + consolidated materials list) to the oer-science-labs static site.
